Being present for each unique moment

14 Apr 2017

Chris Guillebeau shared a Japanese tradition that encourages us to be present and focus on every experience:

We may interact with the same people, within similar circumstances, but ichi-go ichi-e says that each interaction is an experience all unto itself, never to be re-created perfectly.
